info.name: Tooltip Component Extension
info.description: Allows the use of the MutableComponent type from RedWirePlatinum's 'Mutable Components' plugin with new procedures that fit alongside NerdyPuzzle's 'Item Tooltips' plugin.
info.author: MrCreeps
info.credits: This plugin depends on NerdyPuzzle's 'Item Tooltips' and RedWirePlatinum's 'Mutable Components' to work properly.
